title: Super Metroid
description: Speedrun race — fastest completion of a defined route wins. Track energy as health indicator.

p1_energy.notes: AR: 7E09C263 = infinite energy. Current HP at 0x09C2 (16-bit LE). Max 99-999 depending on tanks.

game_state.notes: Game state byte. Detects loading screens, game over, credits (speedrun finish detection).

room_id.notes: Current room pointer — use to detect Zebes escape / Mother Brain room for finish line.

tournament_rules: Any% speedrun race. First to trigger credits (escape sequence completes) wins. Same starting save state. RTA timing from game start to escape timer expiry.
notes: SNES AR codes are 7Exxxxxx format — strip 7E prefix for WRAM address. 0x09C2 = $7E09C2. Verify room_id format for finish detection.
sources: libretro-database/cht SNES AR: 7E09C2 energy, 7E09D6 reserve, 7E09C4 tanks
